subcodes.first_line: O ye who are near-drawn servants of the Blessed Beauty! The question of East-West relations hath assumed great importance. Some [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان مقرب جمال مبارک مسئله ارتباط شرق و غرب اهمیت حاصل نموده است بعضی
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
